title: A Broken World...
body:
**I'm Really, Really sorry to tell this but A Broken World... _will be discontinued on CurseForge Platform_ due to CurseForge not liking the mods that are in the modpack. Of Course the versions 1.0.3 and 1.0.4 will stay but there will be no updates. Version 1.0.5 is OUT. Go check it!**

_Disclaimer:_ **Version 1.0.3 is The Most Scaring one. Play at your Own Risk!**

**🩸 A BROKEN WORLD... – DESCENT INTO CORRUPTION 🩸**

_Only available on Modrinth **(CurseForge too but up to version 1.0.4. ↑↑↑ Read above ↑↑↑)**_

**Welcome to A Broken World... — a heavily atmospheric, terrifyingly immersive horror modpack where the line between Minecraft and madness dissolves.**

You start in a world that looks normal — blue skies, trees, animals. Safe. But it’s all a lie.

Beneath your feet lies an endless underground nightmare, reshaped by cave biome generation that turns every descent into a twisted expedition through the unknown.

**🕳️ Caves Like You’ve Never Seen — Or Survived
The surface world? It’s still there. Forests, deserts, oceans — sure, you’ll see it.
But the real game starts underground.**

Thanks to a cave biome overhaul, the depths are now an alien ecosystem of horrifying beauty. Each biome is a new threat, a new sound, a new shadow. You’ll get lost. You’ll go mad. You’ll beg to see sunlight again.

**😱 True Horror. No Gimmicks. Just Dread.
This isn't your average "dark shaders = horror" pack. This is handcrafted, creeping, corrupting horror — and it's built to get inside your head.**

**From the Fog** – A figure watching you. Sometimes closer.

**Cave Dweller** – You’ll hear it before you see it. Or maybe not.

**The Silence** – Absence of sound. Of hope.

**The Knocker** – It knocks... and one day, it answers.

**000.jar** – A mod that shouldn't exist.

**The Broken Script** – Main mod. It starts subtle: textures flicker, UI glitches, mobs behave oddly. Then the world begins to break.

Each playthrough corrupts differently. Your world is unstable. Unreliable. Wrong.

**🎧 Beautiful Soundscapes Meant to Deceive
At first, the audio is majestic — peaceful winds, soft ambient tones. Calming.
Then silence. Then distortion. Then whispers. Then something breathing beside you.**

This pack uses sound as a weapon. Stay alert.

**⚙️ Optimized for Terror
No lag. No stutter. Just smooth gameplay so your only drops are in your stomach. We made sure this runs great even on lower-end PCs — so everyone can suffer.**

**🛠️ QOL Mods — Before the World Eats Them
Yeah, we gave you some comforts:**

**Better Clouds** – Enjoy the sky while it still looks real.

**Better Advancements** – Track your descent into hell.

**Falling Tree** – Makes wood-chopping a bit easier.

**...and tons more Quality of Life mods** to help you start strong.

But don’t get too attached. The Broken Script corrupts everything — even stability.

**🧩 Fixed Code. Broken Reality.
We even patched and cleaned up Minecraft’s own messy code. Doesn’t matter.
The modpack rewrites itself. Nothing is safe. Not even the rules.**

⚰️ DOWNLOAD IF YOU DARE
Available now on Modrinth and CurseForge.

**Start a world. Explore the caves.
And watch your reality fall apart.**
